headline: Rocket Lab to Release Q1 Earnings: How to Approach the Stock Now?
summary: RKLB heads into Q1 results with launch and space systems momentum, but Neutron and R&D spending, premium valuation and recurring losses may have weighed on the stock.

headline: TransDigm Group Incorporated (TDG) Reports Financial Results For Q2 2026
summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE:TDG) is among the 10 Best Large Cap Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 5, the company reported financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026. Net sales grew 18% from the prior year to $2,544 million.
